channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: 【used】Ernie Ball Music Man / StingRay 5 H NT 2009 4.560kg #E71694【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $2,668
item.description:
$2,668 · Very Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Music Man emerged as Leo Fender's second brand and was loved by bassists worldwide.
Even after being acquired by Ernie Ball, this remains unchanged, and it continues to be widely accepted by modern bassists.

Many artists, including Louis Johnson and Flea, are known to use Music Man basses. (Titles omitted)

The Stingray is a classic model that boasts overwhelming popularity within the brand.

Alongside Fender's Jazz Bass and Precision Bass, it's safe to say it's one of the most popular basses in the world.

This is a 2009 5-string model.

It features a 6-bolt joint, oil-finished neck, and a battery box type, giving it modern specifications.

The body is made of ash, and the fretboard is maple—typical Stingray specifications.

It's characterized by its masculine design with a single humbucking pickup in the bridge position.

If you want this sound, there's no other option.

The frets have approximately 70% remaining.

The truss rod is in good condition.
The neck is in good condition.
The body and paintwork show some minor scratches and dents overall. The pickguard has noticeable scratches throughout. Some tarnishing is visible on the metal parts.
The electronics are in good condition.
The strap pins have been replaced with Schaller ones.
Controls: Volume, Treble, Middle, Bass, Pickup Selector
Nut Width: 45.0mm
Bridge String Spacing: 18.0mm
Scale Length: 34 Inch
Year of Manufacture: 2009
Country of Manufacture: USA

During setup, we used D'addario EXL strings, highly trusted by professional musicians.

Characterized by a powerful attack and rich harmonics, these strings truly deserve to be called a standard.

These high-quality strings bring out the instrument's performance and character to the fullest, so please enjoy them.

GIB's craftsmen will adjust the instrument for easy playability before delivery.

Accessories: Original hard case

Text: Ryoma Terao

Inspection 담당: Hirayama

Product Photos: Tei

GIB 3-Month Warranty Included

●Trade-in for up to 15% OFF

When purchasing, using our trade-in service will give you a 10% discount on the sales price. (Consignment items are excluded. Applicable only if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the sales price.)

Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.

◯GIB, TONIQ Warranty Information

●Lifetime Free Maintenance

Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free "String Vibration Setup" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)

・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.

・Only applicable to the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.

・Please bear the cost of shipping and other miscellaneous expenses.

● Guaranteed Buyback Price

If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee a buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.

● Warranty Against Defects

Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. Excluding some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.

The warranty period is 3 months for used items and 1 year for new items.

Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:

* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.

* Replacement of consumables.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.

* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by parties other than our company.

* If the warranty card does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in. Or, if the text has been altered.

* If the warranty certificate is not presented or is lost.

(Warranty is only valid for purchases made within Japan.)

We ship with sufficient packaging.

We also ship internationally.

●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee
Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.

If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.

Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.
Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.

item.title: Tokai APB-101 MH -Gun Metallic Blue-【Made in Japan】 — $1,088.44
item.description:
$1,088.44 · Brand New · Kurosawa Flagship Store

“Tokai Gakki (Tokai)” has long been highly regarded as a long-established Japanese guitar brand. It is one of the few brands that prioritizes quality over efficiency and has continued to uphold manufacturing processes that have remained largely unchanged since its founding. The exceptional craftsmanship achieved through masterful woodworking techniques and meticulous assembly is highly acclaimed both domestically and internationally, and today, many models produced in the 1970s and 1980s are gaining popularity as “Japan Vintage” instruments. Among these, the Precision Bass models—known by the model name “Hard Puncher”—have become a popular flagship series representing Tokai.


The model we’re featuring today is the “APB-101,” which adopts the standard Precision Bass style. It features a classic combination of materials: an alder body, a maple neck, and a slab-jointed rosewood fingerboard. In addition to a slim neck grip with a nut width of approximately 40 mm, the compound radius—which gradually changes from the low to the high frets—ensures smooth fingering, whether playing chords or phrasing in the higher registers.


It is equipped with standard split-coil pickups. The control layout is simple, featuring a master volume and master tone knob, delivering the authentic character of the Precision Bass directly. Among the many Precision Bass-style models from Japanese brands, this one stands out for its particularly resilient midrange, offering a thick, robust sound that exudes “substance.”


The sound is characterized by the powerful low end and rich midrange typical of a Precision Bass. It delivers a sense of sound pressure without losing definition, ensuring it stands out and doesn’t get lost in a band ensemble. It produces a robust groove when played fingerstyle and a crisp attack when played with a pick, making it a versatile instrument suitable for a wide range of genres from rock to pop. This highly refined model firmly supports the entire ensemble while allowing you to fully enjoy the distinctive presence of a bass guitar.

Please take this opportunity to consider it.


<SPEC>

■Body: Alder

■Neck: Maple

■Fingerboard: Rosewood, 184-260R

■Number of Frets: 20

■Pickup: PB-Vintage MK3

■Preamp: N/A

■Controls: Volume, Tone

■Case: Gig Bag

■Weight: 3.78 kg


About Us

Kurosawa Musical Instruments Japan Main Store

Bass Center/Electric Guitar Floor

Business hours: Monday-Saturday 11:00~20:00, Sunday, Holidays 11:00~19:00

Closed on January 1 and 2

1F, 1-10-8 Hyakunincho, Shinjuku-ku, Tokyo 169-0073, Japan


*Please note that there may be some minor scratches or stains on the body and accessories for B grade new, Outlet New, and New Special Price items.


*We try to reflect the inventory display corresponding to the sale of listed items as quickly as possible, but there may be a time lag,

However, there may be a time lag. Please understand that there may be a time lag.


*Notice-


As this product is being sold in retail stores alongside online stores, there is a possibility that it may be sold out.

Please kindly cancel the order if this happens.


Customs Tax


International Buyers Please Note:

Import duties, taxes, and charges are not included in the item price or shipping cost. These charges are the buyer's responsibility.

Please check with your country's customs office to determine what these additional costs will be prior to bidding or buying.

Customs fees are normally charged by the shipping company or collected when you pick the item up. These fees are not additional shipping charges.

We won't under-value merchandise or mark the item as a gift on customs forms. Doing that is against U.S. and international laws.


Shipping

We only ship to PayPal registered address.


Service: EMS or FedEx


Tracking URL: Japan Post, FedEx

Please Note:

We won't under-value merchandise or mark the item as a gift on customs forms. @Doing that is against U.S. and international laws.

We only ship to PayPal registered address.

Please contact us if you reside in countries in which we do not specify shipping service and cost.

Please be aware that delivery could be delayed depending on customs inspection, in case of natural disasters, and other reasons such as postal strikes.


Payment

We only Accept PayPal.

The item will be shipped within 4 business day after the payment is received.

If payment can't be confirmed within 4 days after the close of the auction, a reminder will be sent to you.


Return Policy

Contact the seller within 3 days of receiving the item.

Please see the "Shipping & Payment" tab for more information.

Returns will only be accepted if the item is defective.

Returns for customer convenience will not be accepted. (Color is not what you expected, heavy, hard to play, lost, etc.).

Cancellations made by the customer will be subject to a 10% handling fee in addition to the shipping fee in any case. Please understand this in advance.


Others

If you have any problem, please contact us. Your satisfaction is important to us.


About Authenticity

All our items are 100% authentic.

We are officially registered as legal business and we have to comply with all rules and @regulations including tax requirements from the Japanese government.

item.title: Fender Squier Vintage Modified Precision Bass 2013 Amber Electric Bass Guitar — $399
item.description:
$399 · Excellent · Austin's Gear Outlet

Squier Vintage Modified Precision Bass (2013) – Translucent Amber – MINT Condition

Up for sale is an absolute time-capsule example of a 2013 Squier Vintage Modified Precision Bass in a gorgeous, glossy translucent Amber finish over a beautifully grained soft maple body.

If you are looking at this listing, you likely already know the reputation of these mid-2010s Indonesian-crafted Squiers. This specific era punches significantly above its weight class in terms of build quality, fretwork, and resonance, often rivaling instruments at twice the price point.

Condition: Mint

This bass has been meticulously cared for and is in new old stock condition

100% factory-original appears to never have been played. The glossy finish looks as deep and vibrant as the day it left the factory.

The Tone: Factory Duncan Designed™ Pickups

Unlike standard budget lines, this Vintage Modified era came factory-equipped with thunderous Duncan Designed™ split single-coil pickups. They deliver that classic, punchy, aggressive '70s P-bass growl heard on countless rock 'n' roll records—warm lows, clear mids, and excellent definition without needing an immediate aftermarket upgrade.

Specifications:

Model: Vintage Modified Precision Bass® (Model #0326802520)

Year: 2013 (Crafted in Indonesia, Serial Prefix: ICS13)

Body: Soft Maple (Trans-Amber gloss finish)

Neck: One-Piece Maple, "C" Shape (Gloss polyurethane finish)

Fingerboard: Maple, 9.5" Radius

Frets: 20 Medium Jumbo

Pickups: Duncan Designed™ PB-101 Split Single-Coil

Controls: Master Volume, Master Tone

Hardware: Chrome (Standard 4-Saddle Bridge and Open-Gear Tuners)

This is a stellar, no-excuses P-bass perfect for the studio, the stage, or a collector looking for a flawless piece from Squier's best modern era.

Bass will be packed securely and shipped quickly. Please feel free to reach out with any questions!

----------------------------------------

The most popular electric bass of all time! The Precision Bass® is considered by many to be the rock 'n' roll bass; truly a workhorse of an instrument. This Vintage Modified Precision Bass offers the stripped-down and straight-ahead tone heard on countless recordings since the dawn of rock. Features include a trans-finished soft maple body, 20-fret one-piece maple neck, thunderous Duncan Designed™ split single-coil pickups, chrome hardware and machine heads, and four-saddle chrome bridge.

Vintage Modified Precision Bass®, Maple Fingerboard, Amber

Model #: 0326802520

item.title: ATELIER Z Beta 5 CTM w/Black Hardware -Transparent White-【Made in Japan】 — $2,615.07
item.description:
$2,615.07 · Brand New · Kurosawa Flagship Store

Atelier Z is a Japanese brand that has earned unwavering acclaim from top musicians both in Japan and abroad. Its design, which incorporates active circuitry, achieves a high-level balance between powerful output and a wide range of sound-shaping capabilities, offering exceptional versatility that works across all genres. In practical settings such as live performances and recording sessions, its readiness for immediate use has established a solid reputation.


This instrument is a custom model of the popular “Beta”—a model that has evolved independently while retaining the 24-fret configuration—based on the brand’s flagship “M# (Magnitude).” By fusing traditional jazz bass styling with modern playability, it delivers greater freedom and expressiveness.


While maintaining a bolt-on construction with an ash body and a one-piece maple neck, the cutaway on the G-string side has been deepened to accommodate the 24-fret configuration. Furthermore, the compact body design ensures excellent maneuverability. Additionally, a heel cut at the joint allows for smooth fingering all the way to the top fret, significantly improving playability in the higher positions.


It is equipped with two original JZ-5 pickups. Their noise-free design ensures a clear output while delivering a rich tone with depth and resonance in the low end. The preamp utilizes the original 18-volt AZ-3B circuit, providing ample headroom and dynamic range. The 3-band EQ allows for boost and cut, enabling precise control over everything from subtle nuances to powerful sounds. Additionally, the tone pot features a push/pull function that allows you to switch to passive mode, enabling flexible use depending on the situation.


In terms of appearance, this model features a custom specification combining a see-through white finish with black hardware. This gives it a sleek, bold look and ensures it stands out on stage. The finish, which combines visual beauty with functionality, will further enhance the joy of ownership.


In addition to the clear and powerful sound unique to Atelier Z, this instrument combines the high playing freedom of a 24-fret design with precise sound-shaping capabilities. It is an extremely attractive option for players seeking modern expressiveness that transcends the confines of vintage style. Boasting a high level of refinement in playability, tone, and appearance, this model will serve as a reliable partner in any musical setting.

We encourage you to consider this opportunity.


<SPEC>

■Body: 2-piece Ash

■Neck: Maple 1P, 34"

■Fingerboard: Maple

■Number of Frets: 24

■Pickup: Atelier Z JZ-5

■Preamp: Atelier Z AZ-3B

■Controls: Volume, Balance, Tone (Active/Passive), Mid, Treble/Bass

■Case: Gig Bag

■Weight: 4.36 kg


About Us

Kurosawa Musical Instruments Japan Main Store

Bass Center/Electric Guitar Floor

Business hours: Monday-Saturday 11:00~20:00, Sunday, Holidays 11:00~19:00

Closed on January 1 and 2

1F, 1-10-8 Hyakunincho, Shinjuku-ku, Tokyo 169-0073, Japan

item.title: YAMAHA USED ​​BBP35 (Vintage Sunburst) — $1,610.81
item.description:
$1,610.81 · Good · Ikebe Music

Our Business Hours is Mon to Fri / 11:00 to 18:00 JPN time
We will close Sat and Sun, so we will reply to inquiry that received weekend on next week.
Your understanding will be appreciated.

We are receiving the customer order with first comes first serves basis both on website and at real shop.
So occasionally it will be sold out while having email communication.
Please understand in advance.

Japanese consumption tax is not required for international shopping. However you may be required to pay duty, tax and import fee when receiving your items in your country. You must pay all these duty, tax and fee as receiver/importer and we do not cover any of them.

■Please note
The product description is an automatic translation of the Japanese description. Please contact us if you have any questions.

-----------------------------------

Please be noted this one is USED not new.
There is not any issue on the function and the playing condition but blemishes on the cosmetic.
Please send message for more detail information of the condition.

-----------------------------------

This model, the successor to the BB2000 series, features a redesigned, smaller body while maintaining the familiar silhouette. It employs a three-layer laminated body construction with alder/maple/alder wood sandwiched together, resulting in a stronger, more durable body with a punchy, crisp sound. Furthermore, it incorporates the proprietary "IRA" treatment, which enhances the vibration of the instrument, improving the sound transmission and vibration efficiency of the wood itself. This enhances the extension of mid-low frequency components and speeds up the rise and decay of high frequency components, resulting in a smooth and deep tone.
The neck is a 5-piece laminated neck made of maple and mahogany, refined to have a slimmer grip shape compared to the BB2000 series, and the fingerboard is made of rosewood. The head shape has also been changed to a smarter size to match the smaller body shape, and lightweight tuners are used to maintain optimal body balance, resulting in a slimmer overall silhouette and an even more comfortable fit.

There is some tarnishing, minor scratches, and light dents on the parts, but it is perfectly playable.
The truss rod has plenty of adjustment range, and the neck is in good condition.

Weight ≈ 4.26 kg
Accessories: Original hard case

item.title: Sire Marcus Miller V7 Ash 2021 Natural Glossy — $536.90
item.description:
$536.90 · Very Good · bassNguitar

This Sire Marcus Miller offers unbeatable value for money. It's the ash model with a maple neck and maple fretboard. The active/passive electronics are extremely comprehensive.


More pix and details upon request.

Shipping worldwide available.

item.title: Ibanez SR535-PW Standard Soundgear Bass 2008 - 2010 - Pearl White — $475
item.description:
$475 · Excellent · The Farm Recording Studio

Ibanez SR535 5-string bass guitar
LIKE NEW - Barely used, kept in climate controlled studio environment ONLY. Case included.

$434.14 · Excellent · Myles Music Shop

Fingerboard: technical wood
Neck: Canada maple
Frets: 24F

Finish: matte
Color: natural

item.description:
$599 · Very Good · 7-Eyed Wolf

Year: 2025

Serial #: MX25144176

Weight: 8lb 3.8oz

Notes: There is a small ding on the Headstock (pictured).


Its a Fender P-Bass in a super eye-catching Hialeah Yellow! Comes with gigbag. Setup with flatwounds in D Standard.

item.title: Ibanez GSR200 with Active EQ - Transparent Red — $160
item.description:
$160 · Excellent · Gardenhead Pro Audio

Ibanez Soundgear bass in excellent condition. Plays and feels great, wide range of sounds from the pickups and eq settings, making it a super versatile affordable bass guitar.

item.title: Hofner 185 Artist Bass 1962 - 1980 - Red — $547.65
item.description:
$547.65 · Non Functioning · Anthony 's Gear Bazaar

Hi all, here is nice project. This is an early 60s Hofner 185, i'm guessing 62/63, but they didn't have serial numbers to later. It has the wonderful staple pickups. The original scratch plate with pickups/pots/switches is provided. As you can see i brought a new scratch plate, the intention of moving the components over. Its the same size, however, one less hole for pots. Tuners work and the bridge and saddle is provided (see pic). I have no idea if the pickups work or not. However, i think everything is there. Selling as is.

I have limited capacity to answer anything about the bass, sorry, i'm guitar player.

Pick up from Beecroft only.

Would consider a trade (no extra cash on my behalf), only interested in small functioning valve amp or higher end pedals. Any way happy to chat on offers.

item.title: Ibanez BTB605LM-BKF [4.42kg] — $936.08
item.description:
$936.08 · Brand New · Kurosawa Music Ikebukuro

Thank you for looking! Feel free to ask for more details. Also, please carefully read our shop policy below the guitar description!

-----------------------------------

A new model has arrived from Ibanez’s popular BTB series, featuring a multi-scale design!

With a matte black finish from the body to the back of the neck and the headstock, accented with gold hardware, it boasts a look that exudes luxury!


[Features]



◆ Rich tone and excellent playability thanks to the through-neck construction


This model features a “through-neck” construction where the neck and body are integrated as a single unit. Since there is no joint, string vibrations are transmitted directly to the entire body without obstruction, delivering rich sustain.

Additionally, the absence of a thick neck heel allows for smooth, stress-free fingering all the way up to the 24th fret.



◆ Multi-Scale Design That Balances Playability and Full-Bodied Bass Tone


The multi-scale design is a hallmark of the BTB series. This model is designed with a scale length ranging from 35 inches on the 5th string to 34 inches on the 1st string.

While maintaining ease of fingering, it ensures optimal tension and a tight tone—even on the bass strings (5th string side), which tend to be thicker and looser—that is on par with the other strings. It produces well-defined, deep bass tones that never get lost in an ensemble.



◆ 5-Piece Neck Construction Balancing Rigidity and Acoustic Characteristics


It features a 5-piece neck construction that alternates layers of maple—known for its clear tone and rich attack—with hard walnut.

Combining these different woods not only creates a sturdy neck resistant to warping and twisting but also further enhances rigidity through an internal graphite rod. This maintains stable performance over the long term while producing a tight, responsive sound.



◆ Tight, Noise-Free Original “T1” Pickup


Equipped with Ibanez’s original “T1” pickup, which features two individually mounted coils to deliver tight bass response, crisp dynamics, and punchy mids.

Each coil is ergonomically positioned to maintain balanced volume across all strings—even on multi-scale models—ensuring a clear and consistent sound.



◆ 3-Band EQ for Intuitive and Versatile Sound Shaping


Equipped with Ibanez’s original 3-band EQ, which produces a wide-range, low-noise active sound.

The midrange—the cornerstone of the sound—can be instantly switched via a mini-switch between three frequency bands: 250 Hz (body and sustain), 450 Hz (clarity and presence), and 700 Hz (attack and definition). This provides powerful support for precise tone shaping tailored to your ensemble or musical genre.


Furthermore, it features an EQ bypass switch, allowing you to switch to a warm, natural passive sound. When bypassed, the Treble knob functions as a passive tone control, enabling seamless tone shaping regardless of whether the EQ is active or passive. (Powered by a 006P 9V battery)



◆ MR5S Monorail Bridge: Maximizes the Resonance of Each String


Features the “MR5S (Monorail)” bridge, which features a structure where each string is completely independent.

By eliminating unwanted vibration interference between adjacent strings, each note is clearly separated without muddiness, and the string’s natural vibration is transmitted directly to the body.


Furthermore, it features a “String Spacing Adjustment Mechanism” that allows the saddles to be adjusted ±1.5 mm left and right. This enables you to finely tune the spacing between the strings (string spacing) to suit your playing style and hand size, allowing you to pursue the optimal playability that suits your preferences.


【Spec】
Neck： 5pc Maple/Walnut w/Graphite reinforcement rods (Neck-through)

Body： Okoume wing body

Fretboard： Rosewood

Fret： Medium Stainless Steel frets 24 (+ zero fret)

Bridge： MR5S bridge (19mm string spacing)

Neck pickup： T1 neck pickup (Passive)

Bridge pickup： T1 bridge pickup (Passive)

Equalizer： Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ w/EQ bypass switch (passive tone control on treble pot) & 3-way Mid frequency switch

【NECK DIMENSIONS】
Scale： 889mm/35" - 864mm/34"

Width at NUT： 47mm

Width at 24F： 75mm

Thickness at 1F： 20mm

Thickness at 12F： 22mm

Radius： 400mmR


[Accessories]

Soft case, hex wrench


*Due to the special coating, there may be white marks that look like scratches visible upon arrival; however, these are within the manufacturer's specifications.



----------------------------------


Please contact us if you have any questions.
*Notice: As this product is being sold in our retail store and website, there is a possibility that it may be sold out when you place your order. We will cancel the sale if this happens.

(Web order and e-mail are available 24/7.)

T.KUROSAWA & CO.,LTD.
Ikebukuro
1-25-１１B1F, Minami Ikebukuro
Toshimaku, Tokyo 171-0022

item.title: Fender P Bass MIM — $695
item.description:
$695 · Good · Truthful Living Music

Does not have the original bridge. Completely set up. Also available at More Music LB in Long Beach California

item.title: Vintage 1974-1975 Gibson Grabber Bass - Fretless (Lined) — $1,999
item.description:
$1,999 · Very Good · AJDem843

Up for sale is an incredibly unique piece of Gibson history: a first-run 1974-1975 Gibson Grabber Bass (Serial No. 406287).

This particular instrument features a beautifully smooth, lined fretless maple fingerboard. The lines are completely flush and smooth to the touch, offering the iconic, woody "mwah" and slide of a fretless combined with the aggressive, mid-forward growl these basses are famous for. Natural finish. 

I am selling this for a friend, who is not a musician.  While researching the bass, I asked him about where he got it, etc.  He said that he bought it for his kids more than 40 years ago.He said that it was already fretless when he bought it.  Based on my research, it did not appear that Gibson made these fretless, but it is an original Grabber neck.  He said that the bass has sat in a closet for decades with no one playing it until he found it and decided to sell it.    

I recently used this bass to record 2-3 tracks in the studio, and the raw, unprocessed direct-input (DI) sound is absolutely stellar. The electronics are pristine, dead quiet, and punchy.

Condition, Setup & Notes:

* **Electronics:** 100% original sliding humbucker on a clear lucite track. The sliding mechanism is fully functional and smooth. Pots and jack are relatively clean.

* **Neck & Playability:** The neck appears to be slightly convex and will require a truss rod adjustment to straighten it out.  Due to this, the action (string height) needs to be dialed in, particularly on the 3rd (A) string, which is sitting a bit low. Slight buzziness when fretting just past the nut. 

* **Cosmetics:** Considerable ‘road’ wear consistent with a 50-year-old instrument. Minor surface dings and light finish wear, but completely structurally sound—does not appear to have headstock cracks or historic breaks.

This is a phenomenal studio weapon for producers or players looking for a rare, distinct vintage vibe that stands out in a mix.

Local pickup only.

item.title: Sire-Marcus Miller U5 '25 Short Scale Bass- Tobacco Sunburst — $550
item.description:
$550 · Excellent · Jeff's Shop

Nearly Brand New Short Scale Sire U5 bass guitar with gigbag & free shipping in the Contiguous United States. There are no dents, dings, scratches, abrasions, of any kind on this bass. It has been played a few times at home, never gigged. The plain truth is I have too many guitars and my wife is on my butt to lighten the load. Purchased new, by myself, from ZZounds at the end of 2025.

Free Shipping in Contiguous US. Gig bag included.

Specs
-Body Material: North American Alder
-Body Shape: Marcus Miller Small J-Style (Slim Carved Body)
-Body Color: NT, TS (Flamed Veneer Top), Mint (Solid Color)
-Neck Wood: Hard Maple
-Neck Shape: C-Shape
-Scale: 30" (Short Scale)
-Fingerboard Material: Hard Maple / Rolled Fretboard Edges
-Fingerboard Radius: 9.5"
-Frets: 2.4mm Medium
-String Nut: Bone Nut, 38mm width
-Binding: None
-Inlay: BK Dot
-Neck Joint: 4-Bolt Steel Square Plate
-Pickup: Marcus Super PJ Revolution Set
-Controls: Passive Volume and Tone Control | Volume (Neck PU), Volume (Bridge PU), Tone (Master)
-Knobs: Modern Black Aluminum
-Bridge: Marcus Miller Vintage-S
-Tuning Gear: Premium Open-Gear
-Hardware Finish: Chrome

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man 30th Anniversary StingRay 5 H 2017 - Transparent Buttercream — $2,700
item.description:
$2,700 · Excellent · Collectors Gear Depot

Up for sale music man 30th anniversary 5H bass immaculate condition I had this bsss for awhile haven’t used it been in the case in the closet for some reason the switch it doesn’t not contact to each 3 ways tone I can hear the switch by moving it but it’s all the same tonality I opened the pick guard to see but everything intact no loose wire according to Music Man sight the switch cost $39 the pickups has no issues…will add better photos tomorrow

🎸truss rod no issues

🎸fret wire excellent

🎸pickups sound beautiful no issues

🎸3 way switch with issues no tones

🎸bass almlost new condition very light scratches From normal plastic very hard to see in the photo no buckle rash i would interested in trades for custom shop Precision in order for safe trade we have to deal with Reverb a pay taxes I buy yours you buy mine let’s talk about price

item.title: Ibanez Roadgear RDGR Sadowsky Onboard Preamp 2025 - Dark Flame Gloss — $3,338
item.description:
$3,338 · Excellent · Lifetime_Geo Boutique

In short:


Ibanez Roadgear RDGR Sadowsky Onboard Preamp + Split-Coil (Adding the Mini Toggle Switch) mod.


*Sadowsky OnBoard Preamp
Humbucker SPLIT ! (Adding the On Off On toggle switch !)

VTC

Seymour Duncan

J-4 Neck pickup

M-4 Bridge pickup

Split-coil

DPDT

On-Off-On 

mini toggle switch


* All electronic and pickups cavities copper shielded to minimize EMI, noises.

The Ibanez electronic cavity originally had a layer of black “shielding paint,” which was totally FAKE! Just there to make everyone feel good 😂


The original Ibanez bass DPDT toggle switch wasn’t made for full coil-split, just 2 positions On-On, with push-pull on volume knob.


So I had to put a new DPDT On-Off-On to enable the bridge pickup - Hum bucker - for Coil -Splitting.


&, Of course ! Comme d’habitude, I’ve added fretworks - Very Little Leveling on high frets for extreme Low Actions + Crownings + Fret-ends rounds - for best confort playing and performance.


Hardware :

- Bass Modified : Ibanez Roadgear RDGR

- Preamp : Sadowsky OnBoard Preamp with VTC

- Pickups : J-4 Seymour Duncan Neck pickup (S), M-4 Bridge pickup (H), with split-coil DPDT On-Off-On  mini toggle switch

item.title: SilverTone Bass Guitar — $250
item.description:
$250 · Very Good · PLM Guitar Setup And Repair Denver,CO


Here’s a cool silvertone bass with a unique look to it. It’s playing smooth and sounds Great without any buzz or rattling frets.

This instrument has received a professional setup by PLM Guitar Setup And Repair Of Denver,CO. That includes brand new strings, cleaning and proper instrument adjustments. Text or Call to sell your music gear in any condition for cash today! Always open for trades in music gear of any condition and type. Call today for a free estimate on repairs. Take advantage of the free pickup and delivery service. —— This is sold by PLM Guitar Setup And Repair Of Denver,CO. All products are shipped in professional packaging to ensure safe delivery.

item.title: Sadowsky Metro Express 5 (Line)+Sadowsky Onboard Preamp VTC 2025 - Pearl White — $3,295
item.description:
$3,295 · Excellent · Lifetime_Geo Boutique

Preamp swapped to SADOWSKY ONBOARD PREAMP with VTC (Made in GERMANY) 😎NOW PLAYS LIKE* A METRO LINE !

*Of course ! Comme d’habitude, I’ve added fretworks - Very Little Leveling on high frets for extreme Low Actions + Crownings + Fret-ends rounds - for best confort playing and performance.

item.title: ‎בְּצַלְאֵל 比撒列 Impossible@bass™ V6 Bartolini + GhostFire Bullet 3.0 GigBag Safe Shipping — $8,790
item.description:
$8,790 · Excellent · Lifetime_Geo Boutique

*Impossible@bass™ בְּצַלְאֵל Bezalel (V6) — 2025 Natural Flame Maple Headless Fanfret 6-String Bass, Neck-Thru, Chambered Ash.

This is The V6 ! THE next evolution of my custom headless 6-string bass series — lighter, sleeker, and easier to play than the previous V5 model, while keeping the same Bartolini electronics for that unmistakable punch and clarity.

This is a neck-thru, chambered custom build, designed for Churches, recordings, University teachings, and live performances. I Mostly played it at Sunday services, Selling as part of a gear clearance before moving abroad.


V6 vs V5

  • 25% lighter
  • 2 mini toggle switches added for parallel/serial switchings
  • Thinner neck for enhanced playability
  • Smaller body size for comfort and ergonomics
  • Same Bartolini MK6CBC pickups & HR-5.0AP/918 preamp
  • Lighter and more compact compared to its “Big brother” model with Luminlay side dot


*** Specifications ***


Construction:

• Headless, fanfret, 6-string

• Neck-thru

• Chambered for maximum weight reduction

• Ash body with flame maple veneer top

• 5-piece maple neck with 2 rosewood inserts

• Maple fretboard

• Flame maple drop top veneer

• 9V battery compartment ×1

• 3D laser-engraved electronic backplate (impossible@guitar+)


Electronics:

• Pickups: Bartolini MK6CBC (Set)

• Preamp: Bartolini HR-5.0AP/918

• Shielding: Full copper shielding for both electronics & pickup cavities against E.M.I — ultra-low noise, cleaner signal


Hardware & Frets* :

• TG fine-tuning bridge with double ball-bearing saddles & locking system

• Polished stainless steel Jimbo frets (SSL)


Scale Length* : 34”–36” multiscale

Neck Thickness* :

• 1st fret: 21.7 mm

• 12th fret: 25.7 mm

• 22nd fret: 31.5 mm


String Spacing* :

• Nut: 8 mm

• Bridge: 14 mm


Condition

• Professionally maintained, fully functional


*The actual measured data may vary.


SAFE SHIPPING with GHOSTFIRE BULLET 3.0 HIGH-END SUPER THICK PADDED GIGBAG

item.title: Rogue Lx400 bass guitar active settings not working — $98.98
item.description:
$98.98 · Fair · Sevens 89

really heavy duty older Rogue bass guitar.

It really surprised me the weight, feel, bridge, and 6 neck bolts. I usually associate rogue with budget but this feels like quality. The bummer is it only works with the push pull pot lifted up. The active is not working at all. Unsure if it’s a solder joint, harness or preamp.

To make the shipping not be 70-95$ I will send with neck detached. I can include the used strings by request they look good but I believe untouched for many years until I rescued it.

item.title: ATELIER Z M#245 Custom (FADE PINK/M/MH) [Atelier Z × IKEBE Original Pouch Gift Included] — $3,169.89
item.description:
$3,169.89 · Brand New · Ikebe Music

Our Business Hours is Mon to Fri / 11:00 to 18:00 JPN time
We will close Sat and Sun, so we will reply to inquiry that received weekend on next week.
Your understanding will be appreciated.

We are receiving the customer order with first comes first serves basis both on website and at real shop.
So occasionally it will be sold out while having email communication.
Please understand in advance.

Japanese consumption tax is not required for international shopping. However you may be required to pay duty, tax and import fee when receiving your items in your country. You must pay all these duty, tax and fee as receiver/importer and we do not cover any of them.

■Please note
The product description is an automatic translation of the Japanese description. Please contact us if you have any questions.

-----------------------------------

[Atelier Z × IKEBE Original Pouch Gift]
We're giving away an original pouch (not for sale) created through a collaboration between Atelier Z and IKEBE!
It fits in the pocket of your gig bag and is convenient for storing maintenance tools like wrenches that tend to get scattered around!
This is a rare item that can only be obtained by those who purchase an Atelier Z bass guitar at Ikebe. Take this opportunity to find your dream Atelier Z!

Eligible products: Purchase an ATELIER Z bass guitar priced at 300,000 yen or more (including tax) and receive a free gift. *This is a limited-quantity gift, so please note that it will be discontinued once supplies run out.
*Some items, such as outlet items, sale items, reuse/second-hand items, and made-to-order items, may be excluded.
----------------------------------------
The M (Magunitude) #245 was released as a signature model for Tomohito Aoki, but it is now used by countless musicians, both professional and amateur, and is a standard model and a representative model of Atelier Z.

Based on the JB tone of the 70s, it boasts clear highs and a powerful low end, and the sound produced by the densely grained ash body delivers the quintessential scooped bass sound. The control system consists only of two volume controls and a 2-band EQ boost for treble and bass, but opening the back panel reveals a Mid-CUT trim, allowing you to adjust it to your preferred settings.
Attention to detail is evident in features such as the neck angle, making it easy to produce sound even with a light touch. It can handle a variety of playing styles, from the bold sound of his signature slap technique to the thick tone of fingerstyle playing and the attack of pick playing, making it a versatile instrument that can be used in any genre.
Furthermore, this model incorporates the Spectrum Boost that Mr. Aoki had been seeking, resulting in a significantly increased sense of power compared to previous models of the same type. In addition to the bold sound he is known for when slapping, it offers a new sonic potential that can handle a wide range of genres.

Furthermore, this model features a satin-finished neck for smooth fingering! It also boasts a custom color, "Fade Pink," on a matching headstock. This guitar offers a distinctly different appeal from the regular M#245; please give it a try!

Body: Ash 2 Pieces
Neck: Maple 1 Piece 34inch
Fingerboard: Maple, 20 Frets
Pickups : Atelier z Magnitude JBZ-4
Bridge: Atelier z BB419
Preamp: Bartorini XTCT
Controls: M.Vol, Balancer, M.Tone/sw, Treble/Bass
Weight: ≈4.09kg

item.title: Peavey T-40 red vintage Bass guitar with Maple Fretboard 1978 - 1988 - Red — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Very Good · Varitone Vintage

Very rare red on blonde, Great condition plenty of fret left 95% at least id say, sounds phenomenal. All electronics function like they should, 70% at volumes splits the coils Etc. comes with OHSC.

item.title: Vintage 1991 Zon Legacy Standard Electric Bass Guitar w/ Original Hardshell Case! — $1,599.99
item.description:
$1,599.99 · Good · Izzy's Vintage Guitars

Up for sale is this vintage 1991 Zon Legacy Standard electric bass guitar. A great playing example of a very rare model, this bass took a bit of a beating over the years but still has a ton of life left in it...

It looks to be all original with the exception of two broken off pickup screws (purely cosmetic and, fortunately, stable as it is so we didn't worry about it), the bridge (there is an outline from a previous bridge, pictured), strap locks (nice leather strap with locks included, pictured), and the back plate screws (the machine screws were replaced with regular wood screws). The original black finish shows pretty heavy wear including a ton of dings (perhaps most notably on the horn, pictured) as well as scuffs and scratches. There is a small finish crack on one side of the nut and some finish flaking on the other side of the nut and around the neck screws (pictured).

Our tech has just gone over this one by polishing the frets, spraying out the electronics, cleaning it up, and performing some light set up work. It's a great playing bass with very low, extremely comfortable action all the way up the neck. If you're heavy-handed, you may get some fret buzz here and there but there is plenty of room to adjust for your playing preferences. The original frets do show some wear and light divoting but still retain plenty of life.

The original Zon hardshell case is included and is in good condition although it does show heavy cosmetic wear. All of the latches and hinges are present and work as they should. The instrument will be well-packed inside and out to ensure safe shipping.

These don't show up for sale often and, while it shows a lot of battle scars, this example is a great sounding and playing instrument that could absolutely quickly become a main axe for someone out there. Don't miss out...

Please be sure to check out our other listings for more great items!

THE FINE PRINT: Most of our items are used/vintage. That being said, all sales are FINAL and we do not offer returns. We only ship within the US. We do NOT make exceptions to this rule. We do not accept online trades. Please check our feedback and buy with confidence. If you have any questions, feel free to contact us.

item.title: F Bass BNF - 4 — $5,500
item.description:
$5,500 · Very Good · Horder

I am selling my 2020-2021 Fbass BNF4. It is in 100% mint condition. There is not one blemish on the instrument. It is as new as when it was shipped to me. Here are the specs of the bass. Feel free to ask me anything about the instrument.



Fretted BNF4

- 24 Fret Fingerboard

- Active / Passive with F Bass Preamp, Two Hum-Cancelling F Bass Stacked Single-Coil Pickups - 34" Scale

- 19mm A Style Bridge

- Black Hardware

- FBass Gig Bag Included

- Antique Stain

- 3 piece body with Hard Maple Centre Block, Flamed Soft Maple Wings, with Ebony Veneers

- 3pc Quarter-Sawn Maple Neck

- Antique Stained Neck

- Dalbergia Nigra Brazilian Rosewood Fretted Fingerboard

- No Face Dots

- Matte Sheen

- Ebony Pickup Shell Veneers to Match Knobs

- Ebony Thumb Rest Between Pickups

item.title: Schecter Stiletto Extreme-4 bass in Black Cherry B-Stock 1793 — $479.20
item.description:
$479.20 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

Schecter Stiletto Extreme-4 Bass in Black Cherry — B-Stock #1793

The Stiletto Extreme-4 delivers a balanced, comfortable playing experience with its thin 'C' neck profile and 34" scale, designed for precise fretwork across 24 X-Jumbo frets. The mahogany body with quilted maple top and cream binding presents a refined aesthetic in Black Cherrybolt-on construction and lightweight design keep fatigue minimal during extended sessions. This B-Stock unit arrives brand new with full Schecter warranty coverage.

Playability & Build

The maple neck and rosewood fretboard with pearloid and abalone vector inlays offer reliable playability and visual appeal. At 0.787" thick at the first fret and tapering to 0.866" at the twelfth, the neck sits comfortably in hand, while the 16" fretboard radius and Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut (1.496" width) ensure clean string articulation across the entire fingerboard.

Tone & Electronics

Two Schecter Diamond Bass humbucking pickups paired with active electronics (volume, blend, and 2-band EQ for bass and treble) deliver versatile tonal control from punchy lows to articulate highs. The 9-volt battery compartment powers the active circuitry, while the Diamond Bass bridge and black chrome hardware ensure stability and durability.

Key Features
  • 4-string configuration with 34" (863mm) scale
  • Mahogany body with quilted maple top and cream 1-ply binding
  • Maple neck in thin 'C' profile; rosewood fretboard with pearloid and abalone vector inlays
  • 24 X-Jumbo frets on 16" radius
  • Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut, 1.496" width
  • Two Schecter Diamond Bass humbucking pickups
  • Active 2-band EQ (bass and treble boost/cut) with volume and blend controls
  • 9-volt battery compartment (clip-in)
  • Diamond Bass bridge with black chrome hardware
  • Schecter tuners
  • Bolt-on construction
  • Right-handed configuration; ships with Ernie Ball 4-String Super Long (.045–.105)

This B-Stock Stiletto Extreme-4 combines professional-grade electronics, hardware, and materials in a lightweight, ergonomic design—a solid four-string platform for both session work and live performance.

This specific B-Stock unit features minor cosmetic imperfections typical of B-Stock inventory. These marks are purely superficial and have absolutely zero impact on the playability, tone, or structural integrity of the bass. Acquire this premium Schecter Stiletto Extreme-4 at a significant B-Stock discount while enjoying complete manufacturer warranty coverage.

item.title: 1973 Fender Vintage USA Jazz Bass Neck Plate — $225
item.description:
$225 · Very Good · JJ's Gear Garage

1973 Fender Vintage USA Bass Neck Plate In very good condition. All original, screws, plastic backplate, and neck plate. Ready for your vintage Fender. Will be packed well, and insured. PLEASE ASK ANY QUESTIONS BEFORE BUYING AND MAKING AN OFFER.

48 States Only, No Overseas

item.title: Gibson Fretless Ripper 1978 Sunburst N Mint "Time Capsule" OHC & Tags — $3,400
item.description:
$3,400 · Excellent · The Classic Axe

This bass is in Near Mint condition. Has a tiny nick near the bottom strap button all else mint. The bass plays & sounds great. It's a 100% original. There is some nice figure that is better in person than in photos. Low action & A real nice Ebony board strung with flats, The case is in Great condition also. Comes with a set of tags . As it appeared out of the factory in 1978. it is a 45 year old "Time Capsule". The bass weighs just below 12 pounds.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI 2019 - Present - Black — $498.92
item.description:
$498.92 · Good · Bison Friendly Guitars

This is an intriguing instrument and really fun to play - a six string bass with style and a wammy bar? Oh yes! The neck is good and it's really playable. It's in great condition as are the strings - except for one knock on the bottom - the paint is chipped off exposing the wood (also painted black so it's hard to see) in a section about 4cm by 2cm.

I've attached a photo of this. I've never gigged it and only played it in a smoke-free home. It's got no case and although I will package it extremely well and it will be insured.

item.title: Player Jazz Bass®, Maple Fingerboard, Tidepool - Sea Foam Green — $500
item.description:
$500 · Very Good · Josh's Place

Here is the link from Fender's website that describes it's original specs:

This base has been used at church since I purchased it new. There are some ripples on the body's backing that does not impact its playability. Also, the 9th fret discolored a bit. I am unsure as to why this happened as I keep the base in its gig bag while not in use. With that said, it still plays wonderfully. I am parting with this bass because I recently purchased a new Jackson Pro Series Spectra Bass SBP IV. I want to use the funds from this sale to purchase a P-Bass to add to my lineup.

The gig bag comes with the bass.

item.title: 2004 Squier Affinity Precision Bass - Galactic Blue - 4 String — $225
item.description:
$225 · Very Good · Guitars West

2004 Squier Affinity Precision Bass

- Galactic Blue

- 4 String

- 8.1 LBS

You are looking at a 2004 P-Bass in the classic Galactic Blue finish. This isn't a modern mass-produced unit; this was crafted at the highly-regarded Cort (IC) factory in Indonesia during an era known for consistent build quality and excellent neck stability.

Verified Year: 2004 (Serial Prefix IC04)

The Look: Solid Galactic Blue finish with a crisp white pickguard.

The Sound: That unmistakable 20-year-old seasoned wood tone. It delivers the punch and low-end clarity you expect from a genuine Precision Bass.

Shipping: Fast, secure shipping from Murrieta, CA.

Guitars West Shipping & Return

In our 40 + years of business, customer service has always been the utmost Importance to us.

If you have ANY questions, comments, or concerns, please contact us BEFORE purchasing this item!! We are happy to offer a short clip of the tone/sound of your preferred item as well. Just give us a call/email and we’ll get it to you asap.

We do have a Strict NO Return Policy. If you receive your item and it’s not as described, we will take that into consideration.

We are very confident that our thorough, honest, detailed descriptions are backed by our knowledge of this industry. I can assure you that you?ll be getting exactly what you anticipated.

If purchased on SALE/DISCOUNT, the item is considered SOLD AS IS and will NOT be considered for a return.

International Shipping: We charge an estimated flat rate fee. Our rates listed are just ESTIMATES. If it exceeds the flat rate price, the shipping amount is subject to change. Please call us for exact estimates.

Thanks - GW Crew

item.title: 2025 Schecter C-4 Standard Electric Bass! Tobacco Burl Finish! VERY NICE!!! — $399
item.description:
$399 · Mint · Top 40 Guitars

At Top 40 Guitars, customer satisfaction is our first concern. All of our items have a 14 day return policy. If after 14 days you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, please return it for a refund....Peace be with you...


*all returned items must be in the same condition they were at the time of sale. All original packing must be included.


#
Up for Sale is a


2025 Schecter C-4 Standard Electric Bass!

Tobacco Burl Finish!

This is really Cool. You are looking at a 2025 Schecter C-4 Standard Electric Bass. Iconic Tobacco Burl Finish. The C-4 Standard Tobacco Burl bass guitar is a true workhorse designed for players who demand both power and style. With a mahogany body and a stunning figured burl top, this bass is as visually striking as it is sonically versatile. Known for crafting instruments that can handle everything from metal to jazz, Schecter has equipped the C-4 Standard with features that deliver uncompromising tone and playability. Whether you're performing live or recording in the studio, this bass provides the depth and clarity you need to make every note count.

This Bass has never been sold before. It was used at Schecter's Corporate office for Internet Sales Videos, Print Media and Brochure photos. Not a "B" Stock, Factory Return or Open Box. It is in "Like New" Condition. It is being sold as a used Bass.

From The Web:


Crafted for Comfort and Performance
This bass is built with a roasted maple neck and a rosewood fingerboard, giving you a smooth, responsive feel under your fingers. The thin “C” neck shape provides comfortable playability, allowing for fast and effortless movement up and down the fretboard. With a 34” scale length and 16” fingerboard radius, this bass strikes the perfect balance between playability and tone, making it versatile enough for any style of music. Whether you’re laying down a groove or playing intricate lines, the C-4 Standard delivers.

Powerful Tone With Schecter’s Signature Pickups
Equipped with Schecter Diamond Standard soapbar pickups in both the bridge and neck positions, the C-4 Standard gives you a full range of tones to explore. The soapbar pickups are designed to provide clarity, punch, and warmth, making them suitable for everything from aggressive rock to mellow jazz. Each pickup has independent volume and tone controls, allowing you to fine-tune your sound and create the perfect mix for any playing situation. These pickups are a signature feature of Schecter’s bass lineup, offering both versatility and power.

Durable Hardware for Reliable Performance
The C-4 Standard doesn’t just sound great—it’s built to last. With black hardware and a Schecter Diamond bass bridge, this bass offers solid tuning stability and sustain. The Schecter bass tuners provide smooth and accurate tuning adjustments, while the 38mm graphite nut ensures that your strings stay in tune even during intense playing. This attention to detail and reliability is what makes Schecter guitars and basses a top choice for professional musicians who need an instrument they can depend on.

Built to Inspire on Stage and in the Studio
Whether you’re hitting the stage or recording in the studio, the Schecter C-4 Standard Tobacco Burl Bass Guitar is designed to inspire. Its bold design, rich tone, and exceptional playability make it a versatile instrument for any musician. Complete with a 24-fret rosewood fingerboard and jumbo frets, the C-4 Standard offers both comfort and precision for players at any level. And with its eye-catching tobacco burl finish, this bass is sure to turn heads wherever you play.

Features:

  • Mahogany body with a striking figured burl top
  • Schecter Diamond Standard soapbar pickups for versatile tones
  • Independent volume and tone controls for each pickup
  • Roasted maple neck with a smooth rosewood fingerboard
  • Schecter Diamond bass bridge for stability and sustain

Specs:
Body:

  • Body wood: Mahogany with figured burl top
  • Binding: Black single-ply on body and neck

Neck:

  • Neck material: Roasted maple
  • Neck shape: Thin C
  • Scale length: 34"
  • Fingerboard radius: 16"
  • Nut width: 38mm
  • Nut material: Graphite

Fingerboard:

  • Fingerboard material: Rosewood
  • Inlays: White pearloid dot
  • Number of frets: 24 jumbo

Electronics:

  • Pickup configuration: Soapbar
  • Bridge pickup: Schecter Diamond Standard soapbar
  • Neck pickup: Schecter Diamond Standard soapbar
  • Controls: Independent volume and tone controls for bridge and neck pickups

Hardware:

  • Hardware color: Black
  • Tuners: Schecter bass tuners
  • Bridge: Schecter Diamond bass bridge

Our luthier did a complete setup. Brand new strings were installed. Gig ready on Arrival!


Nut Width: 1.496"

Weight: 7.55 lbs.


Case is NOT Included!

Due to CITES Treaty for Endangered Wood (Mahogany, Rosewood) We no longer ship out of the USA.


Cosmetics: Mint Condition. 

  • Top 40 Guitars is a Veteran Owned Business!
  • Thanks For Supporting Veterans!

item.title: Washburn AB-10 acoustic/electric bass w/bag - blk — $435
item.description:
$435 · Very Good · Guit-fiddle Shop

Works great. Straight neck, low action, truss turns, frets are excellent, electronics are clean. New D'Addario 45s. Has some scratches and light wear throughout. Truss cover is aftermarket. It isn't a perfect fit and is only using one screw since the other two holes don't line up. Bag is in great shape.

Ships to lower 48. No international. No P.O. boxes. No trades. Return policy: happy to take a return if the item doesn't match the description&photos. If there's shipping damage we'll get it sorted quickly. But I can't take any more "bought this by mistake" returns. One-man operation here. The last straw was a guy who complained an item was "in too good condition". Anyway, please triple check your order before purchasing. Thanks for understanding.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Stingray 3 EQ H 2008 - Black/Maple w/ Hard Case — $1,650
item.description:
$1,650 · Very Good · Prism Analog

Nice '08 Stingray bass. 3 EQ H in black/maple. Some wear to fingerboard varnish, but just adds character. Very solid instrument, looks and plays the part. Not pictured, but included: Original Music Man hard case, also super solid.

Pick up in Philly is OK.

item.title: 1973 Fender USA Jazz Bass Original Vintage Tuners — $275
item.description:
$275 · Very Good · JJ's Gear Garage

1973 Fender USA Jazz Bass Original Vintage Tuners in very good condition. Original, ferrules, and tuners. 8 screws are longer, appear original, 8 are shorter and more shiny, possibly replacements. Tuners work perfectly, light tarnishing, and wear. Ready for your vintage bass. Will be packed well and fully insured. PLEASE ASK ANY QUESTIONS BEFORE BUYING OR MAKING AN OFFER.

48 States Only, No Overseas

item.title: Michael Kelly Club Custom 4N Acoustic Bass Guitar — $350
item.description:
$350 · Excellent · Jonny's Bass Basket

Selling my old Schecter acoustic-electric bass (06060093) that I hardly ever use now. There are no dents or scratches on this instrument, so it's basically as good as new. All electronics are original and unmodified, and a fitted hard case/guitar strap will be included.


Available for local pickup in Arlington, VA or willing to meet up in the surrounding areas. Price is negotiable.

item.title: Schecter Stiletto Studio-4 FL Active Fretless 4-String Bass 2010s - Honey Satin — $600
item.description:
$600 · Very Good · Jonny's Bass Basket

Selling my old 2010s Schecter fretless bass (W11121245) that I hardly ever use now. There is a small dent on the back side (see last pic), but otherwise, it's basically as good as new. All electronics are original and unmodified, and a standard Road Runner hard case will be included.


Available for local pickup in Arlington, VA or willing to meet up in the surrounding areas. Price is negotiable.

item.title: YAMAHA RBX550 M ELECTRIC BASS GUITAR W.EMG'S TRANS. BLUE 1980's (USED) — $399.99
item.description:
$399.99 · Very Good · Harper's Music Store

YAMAHA RBX550 M ELECTRIC BASS GUITAR W.EMG'S TRANS. BLUE 1980's (USED)

This is a Used Item in Very Good Condition. The pickups have been upgraded to EMG's. The input jack has been moved from the side to the face of the bass.
The Original Volume and Tone controls for the bass have been modified from the original 3 holes, and a dummy toggle switch was installed.  
There are two small screw holes on the face of the bass by the bottom. There are some scratches/dings from normal wear.
Please view pictures and approve condition before purchasing.
Does not come with a case.

***PICKUP ONLY***

Here is some info from the web for the Original (Un-Modded) Bass. (Please check for accuracy):

 The Yamaha RBX 550M is a passive electric bass guitar introduced in the late 1980s. The "M" designation specifies that it features an optional maple fingerboard with black dot markers, differentiating it from the standard rosewood model. Key Features
  • Tonewoods: Built with an alder or basswood body, a bolt-on maple neck, and a matching maple fretboard.
  • Electronics: Configured with passive Precision/Jazz (P/J) pickups controlled by a master volume, tone, and pickup selector knob.
  • Design: Noted for its highly lightweight, balanced body, distinctive pointed or 3D headstock, and 22 frets.

item.title: Ibanez GSRM20 Gio miKro Soundgear 2023 - Pearl White — $200
item.description:
$200 · Excellent · Guitarminator's Shop

New with tags. Purchased as a backup, no longer needed. Never gigged only played for an hour at most. Ships well packed and quick. FREE SHIPPING

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass Special Fretless - Candy Apple Red — $989
item.description:
$989 · Very Good · Brian's Stuff

1986 Fender Jazz Bass Special — Made in Japan — Fretless — Candy Apple Red —
Here's a rare one — a mid-1980s Fender Jazz Bass Special, Made in Japan, in stunning Candy Apple Red with all-black hardware. Serial number D920289 dates this to approximately 1986, right in the sweet spot of Fender Japan's golden era of production.
These basses are legendary in the bass world — the same model made famous by Duff McKagan of Guns N' Roses during their classic era. The Jazz Bass Special combines a Precision Bass body with a Jazz Bass neck profile and a versatile P/J pickup configuration — giving you the best of both worlds in one instrument.
What makes this one special: it's a fretless — rare on this model, which came fretted as standard. If you're looking for a smooth, singing fretless tone with the punch of a P/J pickup setup, this is a seriously hard combination to find.
Specs:

1986 Fender Jazz Bass Special — Made in Japan
Serial: D920289
Candy Apple Red finish
P/J pickup configuration
Fretless rosewood fingerboard
Black hardware throughout
Active electronics cavity routed in back (no pickguard)
Condition: Very good — clean finish, minimal wear

These MIJ Fenders from the mid-80s are widely regarded as some of the best production Fenders ever made — built at the Fuji-gen factory with materials and fit/finish that rivaled and often exceeded what was coming out of the US factory at the time.

item.title: Fender American Original '50s Precision Bass with Maple Fretboard 2018 - White Blonde — $1,995
item.description:
$1,995 · Excellent · Mike's Shop

Excellent condition. Includes original tweed case, bridge cover, pickup cover, COA, and all original case candy.

Upgraded with Fender Pure Vintage 63 Precision pickups. Original pickups are not included.

Body: Alder
Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer Finish
White Blonde
Thick C Maple Neck
Maple Fingerboard
9.5" Fingerboard Radius
Vintage Tall Frets
34" Scale Length
1.73" Bone Nut
Pure Vintage 63 Split-Coil Precision Pickup
Pure Vintage Reverse Open-Gear Tuners
Vintage-Style 4-Saddle Threaded Steel Bridge
Includes Vintage Tweed Hardshell Case

item.title: Yamaha SB-2 Japan 1960s — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Good · Polyisus Vintage Gear Shop

For sale my vintage short scale Yamaha SB-2 bass from 60s

It is lightweight and resonant, sunburst finish and all original components.

a recent refret makes it extremely comfortable and stable to play.

weight: 3.9kg

item.title: Wal Mk 1 4-String Bass 1987 — $9,170
item.description:
$9,170 · Excellent · JAMES's Gear Emporium CF

Beautiful and rare!

1987 Wal Mk I 4-string bass, serial number W2924, in very good condition.

  • Mahogany body
  • Walnut top
  • Ebony fingerboard

Includes the original hard case.

If you're looking at this listing, you already know what this instrument is—there's no need to explain the outstanding tonal possibilities of this exceptional bass.

item.title: Spector NS Dimension 5 2022 - Present - Black & Blue — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Very Good · Vatos Closet

This is a 2022 Spector NS Dimension 5 bass that is now discontinued. Neck is straight, truss rod turns as it should, all electronics and Fluence voices work correctly, and the bass plays cleanly across the fingerboard without any functional issues. Very good overall for its age, but it is not mint. There is a small finish chip/ding along the upper edge of the headstock and on the side of the neck shown clearly in the close-up photos. Please review all photos closely, as they are part of the condition description.

item.title: Fender Flea Artist Series Road Worn Signature Jazz Bass 2016 - Present - Shell Pink — $1,000
item.description:
$1,000 · Excellent · Pops Boutique

Rarely played 2016 Flea Roadworn Jazz Bass. Gig bag included. Selling to thin collection and because I prefer P-Basses. Lovely addition to any bassist’s arsenal. Looking for a good home and to be played. Thank you for considering.

item.title: Aria Dimond 1980 - Floss black — $350
item.description:
$350 · Very Good · Randybasap

Vintage 1980s Aria diamond in almost excellent condition this base still plays like a dream it's professionally set up comes with the original hard shell case classic japanese craftsmanship.

item.title: Ibanez GSR200-TR Transparent Red — $225
item.description:
$225 · Excellent · Tyler’s Shop

Ibanez gio200 transparent red. looks great and plays great. Bought it new and have barely played it.


The Ibanez GSR200 4-string electric bass guitar is a hot little bass for a very friendly price. The GSR200 features a poplar body, super comfy one piece maple neck, jatoba fretboard, white dot inlay, split-coil and single-coil pickup array, active EQ with PHAT II Bass Boost, chrome hardware, a fully adjustable bridge and medium frets

item.title: Fender American Vintage '74 Jazz Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2013 - 2014 - Natural — $2,000
item.description:
$2,000 · Excellent · Skyline Guitar

Fender American Vintage '74 Jazz Bass. Excellent condition.

Plays superbly. Electronics are working properly. Frets are in excellent condition, with no fret wear. Very low playing time. One small finish imperfection, as seen in the photos. It is an indent on the finish, but does not go all the way to the wood. Small and not visible at a distance. Otherwise, no other scratches or dents.

Fender has been doing various replica years in the American Vintage series for a while now. This one is modeled on the '74 specs, an era that featured block inlays fretboard markers, binding on the neck, the option for 'natural' finish, and the 70's era headstock decals.

Great for a pure player, or for a player/collector.

Please take a close look at the photos for the condition.

I am a player and a collector, not a shop. Therefore, I sell items as-is and cannot offer returns (outside of shipping damage claims, which have never happened on my sales so far, luckily).

I take pride in trying to give an accurate description of the pieces I sell. I want the buyer to be happy with the condition of any piece I sell, so please let me know if you have any questions that you need addressed.

I have included a screenshot of the specs provided by Fender.


This is the text of Fender's description when they were available: "For the bassist who craves pure vintage Fender style, the American Vintage series presents original-era model year basses built with meticulous attention to accurate detail that bring Fender history and heritage to authentic and exciting new life.

If you prize the Jazz Bass and love the 1970s, this bass was made for you. A pure, powerful and proven instrument with singing high end and guttural growl, the mid-'70s Jazz Bass is an elemental must-have classic stylishly built with the heart of rock and the soul of funk. Built using original tooling and based on actual 1974 models we tracked down, the U.S.-made American Vintage '74 Jazz Bass honors a great instrument from a fantastic era."
